nasb.text: They will call peoples to the mountain; There they will offer righteous sacrifices; For they will draw out the abundance of the seas, And the hidden treasures of the sand.”

esv.text: They shall call peoples to their mountain; there they offer right sacrifices; for they draw from the abundance of the seas and the hidden treasures of the sand.”

cnv.text: 他們要把萬民召到山上來， 在那裡要獻上公義的祭； 因為他們要吸取海洋的豐富， 沙土中埋藏著的寶藏。”

ccb.text: 他们要招聚众人上山， 一同献上公义的祭； 他们汲取海里的财富和沙中的宝藏。”
